# UNDRGRND Movement — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models and crawlers accurately understand and represent this website.
# Format follows the llms.txt specification: https://llmstxt.org

# Last updated: 2026-03-26

> UNDRGRND Movement is a boutique movement studio located in Southport on the Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. The studio offers beginner-friendly adult and kids classes across dance, pole fitness, yoga, and aerial arts disciplines. The philosophy centres on personal expression, self-discovery, and movement as a form of empowerment — not competition or performance. All programs are designed for complete beginners with no prior experience required.

## Business Information

- **Business Name:** UNDRGRND Movement
- **Address:** 163 Ferry Rd, Southport QLD 4215, Australia
- **Phone:** 0721 402 690
- **Email:** undrgrndgc@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://www.undrgrnd.com.au
- **Location:** Southport, Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia
- **Studio Hours (Mon–Fri):** 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- **Studio Hours (Sat–Sun):** 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

## What We Offer

UNDRGRND Movement offers movement classes for adults and children. All classes are beginner-friendly and structured around the "Foundations" level — meaning no prior experience is needed to join any class.

### Adult Programs — Currently Active

- **Booty Burn - Foundations** — High-energy dance fitness class focused on glute activation and lower body strength. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/booty-burn-foundations.html
- **Movement Flow - Foundations** — Natural movement principles to build coordination, body awareness, and fluid motion. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/movement-flow-foundations.html
- **Fusion Yoga - Foundations** — A blend of traditional yoga and modern movement to build mobility and strength. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/fusion-yoga-foundations.html
- **Aerial Silks - Foundations** — Learn to climb, wrap, and create shapes using suspended fabric silks. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/aerial-silks-foundations.html
- **Choreography Fusion - Foundations** — Build confidence through simple, guided dance choreography. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/choreography-fusion-foundations.html
- **Stretch & Mobility - Foundations** — Improve flexibility, reduce stiffness, and move better. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/stretch-mobility-foundations.html

### Adult Programs — Coming Soon

- **Recovery Movement Flow - Foundations** — Gentle, supportive movement for those returning after injury. Medical clearance required. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/recovery-movement-flow-foundations.html
- **Pole Fitness - Foundations** — Structured beginner pole fitness classes focused on strength and technique. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/pole-fitness-foundations.html
- **Pole Flow - Foundations** — Smooth transitions and connected sequences on the pole. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/pole-flow-foundations.html
- **Pole Strength & Movement - Foundations** — Advanced conditioning, holds, and controlled movement on the pole. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/pole-strength-movement.html
- **Aerial Yoga - Foundations** — Supported movement in a hammock to build flexibility and decompress joints. Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/aerial-yoga-foundations.html

### Kids Programs — Coming Soon

All kids programs are currently in development and will be available soon. Classes are designed for children and are age-appropriate, non-competitive, and focused on building confidence, coordination, and creativity.

- **Kids Yoga - Foundations** — Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/kids-yoga.html
- **Kids Aerial Yoga - Foundations** — Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/kids-aerial-yoga.html
- **Pole Fitness Kids - Foundations** — Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/kids-pole-foundations.html
- **Kids Aerial Silks - Foundations** — Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/kids-aerial-silks.html
- **Dance Moves (Urban Mix) - Foundations** — Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/kids-dance-moves.html
- **Modern Contemporary (Rhythm & Motion) - Foundations** — Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/kids-modern-contemporary.html
- **Creative Dance - Foundations** — Page: https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/programs/kids-creative-dance.html

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do I need experience to join a class?**
No. All programs are designed for complete beginners. The "Foundations" level is the entry point for every discipline.

**Where is UNDRGRND Movement located?**
163 Ferry Rd, Southport QLD 4215. The studio is in Southport on the Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia.

**What types of classes are available?**
Dance fitness, pole fitness, yoga, aerial silks, aerial yoga, choreography, stretch and mobility, and recovery movement. Kids classes across dance, yoga, aerial, and pole are coming soon.

**How do I book a class?**
Visit the timetable page at https://www.undrgrnd.com.au/timetable.html to view availability and book online.

**Is UNDRGRND Movement suitable for all fitness levels?**
Yes. All classes welcome all body types and fitness levels. The focus is on personal progress and expression, not performance or competition.
